THE COURT AND COUNSEL DISCUSS THE MOTION. THE COURT OVERRULES SPECIAL DEMURRER TO ABATE OR IN THE ALTERNATIVE, STAY ACTION, OVERRULES GENERAL DEMURRER TO DISMISS PLAINTIFF'S SIXTH CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUSTAINS WITHOUT LEAVE DEFENDANTS' DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S EIGHTH CAUSE OF ACTION.
